title: gynura divaricata subsp. formosana
intro: Gynura divaricata subsp. formosana, commonly known as Formosan spiny mint or Formosan bitter leaf, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gynura divaricata subsp. formosana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
